property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-17\bin;C:\Windows\Sun\Java\bin;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:/Users/user/.gemini/antigravity-ide/bin;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\Maven\apache-maven-3.9.16\bin;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop\bin;C:\Users\user\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\user\AppData\Local\Programs\Antigravity IDE\bin;.

testcase.name: sendForgotPasswordEmail_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T02:21:41.551+05:30 INFO 13784 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.EmailService : Forgot password email sent successfully to: user@test.com

testcase.name: sendForgotPasswordEmail_Failure_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-23T02:21:41.553+05:30 ERROR 13784 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.EmailService : Failed to send forgot password email to user@test.com: Mail sender error

testcase.name: sendOtpEmail_Success
testcase.system-out: 2026-06-23T02:21:41.554+05:30 INFO 13784 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.EmailService : OTP email sent successfully to: user@test.com

testcase.name: sendOtpEmail_Failure_ThrowsException
testcase.system-out:
2026-06-23T02:21:41.555+05:30 ERROR 13784 --- [ main] com.company.mts.service.EmailService : Failed to send OTP email to user@test.com: Mail sender error
